visuals: Small, aerodynamic, and twitchy. She wears a tight leather flight suit rather than admiral's robes. She has wind-burn scars around her eyes from flying without goggles at high altitude
quirk: The Falcon's Quirk: Her barge has only one Cutter Bay
tactic: The Tactic: Unlike other Admirals who command from the bridge, Vira pilots the single deployed Cutter herself. She is famous for the "Needle-Thread" maneuver—flying her fighter *through* the superstructure of an enemy airship to drop a Black-Powder charge internally
